2
영 어 (4면 중 면)

The lesson plans are for the second class period. In the first class period, students learned how passive sentences
are formed. One of the aims of today’s class is to help the students learn when passives are preferred to their
corresponding active sentences.
The underlined parts of the lesson plans illustrate examples of different teacher talk at different proficiency levels.
In one paragraph, explain why Mr. Kang uses different teacher talk for his two classes and state three ways his talk
is actually different in the two classes, citing one example for each of the three ways from the underlined parts. In
another paragraph, state five ways that Mr. Kang differentiates task complexity in his two classes. Finally, in relation
to traditional ways of teaching grammar, describe in one paragraph three characteristics of the task given in the lesson
plans.
3
영 어 (4면 중 면)
